Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce updated declare_model dictionary with new constraints We need to add constraints for fairness coexistence response succession non succession etc

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We should define new activities ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantRace or CheckSensitiveAttribute Also decision steps for sensitive applicants Approve Minority Reject Minority But maybe we can just use generic decisions but ensure that if a sensitive attribute is checked then a bias mitigation check must happen before decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can add response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck succession BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision non succession CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision prevent direct coexistence between ManualReview and FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: DECLAR E constraints are global across traces they do not condition on presence of other events However we can approximate fairness by requiring that certain events always coexist with others regardless of context

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For unary constraints map activity name to support 1 0 confidence 1 0 For binary constraints map source to target to support 1 0 confidence 1 0

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Add existence for BiasMitigationCheck and ManualReview This may force them even when no sensitive attribute is present still okay as a fairness measure

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Succession from BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision may be too strict because RequestAdditionalInfo could come between them So better use response rather than succession

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Add under response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck and BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision Add under nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We will show the full dictionary including all original keys and insert the new entries with proper nested structure and support confidence fields
